A person has been taken into custody after allegedly planning a mass shooting at a large festival in Louisiana, the Okaloosa County Sheriff’s Office says.

"The OCSO was contacted by federal authorities in reference to a male from North Carolina being in our jurisdiction while reportedly heading to do a mass shooting at a large festival in Louisiana. Our Bravo East Deputies located the male at a Destin hotel and he was taken into custody tonight without incident as a fugitive from justice. He will be extradited to Louisiana for his charges from state police there. Excellent work by all," the sheriff's office said in a statement.

RT by @OsintTV: ब्रिगेडियर नीरज खजूरिया और आर्मी एयर डिफेंस यूनिट के कमांडिंग ऑफिसर का बड़ा खुलासा—ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में राजस्थान-कच्छ सेक्टर में भारतीय सेना का पराक्रम, 7 मई 2025 को पूर्ण तैनाती के बाद दुश्मन के ड्रोन हमलों को किया ध्वस्त, 5 पाकिस्तानी ड्रोन मार गिराए, संवेदनशील रण और क्रीक क्षेत्र में बिना किसी नुकसान के बचाए महत्वपूर्ण सैन्य और नागरिक ठिकाने

In a powerful account from Bhuj, Gujarat, Brigadier Neeraj Khajuria, Commander of 75 (Independent) Infantry Brigade, and the Commanding Officer of an Army Air Defence Unit have revealed the extraordinary scale, precision, and coordination behind Operation Sindoor in the highly sensitive Rajasthan–Kachchh sector.

Between 7th and 12th May 2025, Pakistan deployed multiple drones targeting critical military and civilian infrastructure across the Rann and Creek regions. Responding with unmatched speed and precision, Indian Army formations carried out swift mobilisation and achieved full operational readiness by 7th May. The Army Air Defence warriors demonstrated exceptional skill and composure under pressure, successfully neutralising repeated aerial threats and destroying five Pakistani drones in the sector.

What stands out is the seamless jointness between the Indian Army, Indian Air Force, BSF, Coast Guard, intelligence agencies, and civil administration. A robust, multi-layered anti-drone grid combined with advanced surveillance systems ensured that every incoming threat was detected, tracked, and neutralised before causing any damage. Simultaneously, a well-coordinated civil defence mechanism safeguarded population centres and vital installations.

Operation Sindoor not only prevented any damage to key military or civilian infrastructure but also highlighted India's growing technological edge, operational preparedness, and decisive response capability. The mission stands as a testament to the unwavering resolve, high morale, and lethal precision of Indian forces—sending a clear message that no matter how the threat evolves, India's skies will remain sovereign and secure.

RT by @OsintTV: *Army Officer Awarded Compensation for Illegal Toll Charge* 

HC enforces the law and the rights of Armed Forces

In a significant judgment reinforcing the rights of defence personnel, the High  Court,Jaipur  has ruled in favor of myself when I  was unlawfully charged at a toll plaza despite being exempt under Government of India rules.

This case happened  wen I was travelling from jhunjhunu to jaipur alongwith my family! I was  compelled to pay toll charges in violation of established exemption norms applicable to serving Army personnel despite showing the I CARD ! I came to know that at this Toll plaza many of our serving soldiers been forced to pay Tolls ,hence, instead of arguing wid these Goons i decided to collect the proofs & filed a case at Jaipur High Court!The matter highlighted serious lapses in compliance by the toll operator and the inconvenience caused to the serving Soldiers!

After examining the facts and submissions, the Hon’ble Court held the toll collection was illegal and unjustified. *Accordingly, with good wishes of u all,the Court directed the concerned party to pay compensation of ₹50,000 to the claimant for the harassment and inconvenience suffered, along with ₹10,000 towards litigation expenses.* ( *which I'll b donating to army fund itself)* 

This judgment is being viewed as an important step toward safeguarding the dignity and legal rights of members of the armed forces, while also ensuring greater accountability in toll operations.
This is first time such verdict has come from any High Court!
All are requested for wide publicity of judgement so that our soldiers are not forced for same!
Iam just sharing a short video clip of incident that  happened wid me  alongwith last page of judgement!

Incase anyone needs complete copy of judgement please do let me know 🙏
